title: View items having time tracked this week + active timer overview

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Built a little app for my own use. I only track actual time for specific cases, and mostly just track that I worked on an item on a day. (Have a button that starts and immediately stops the timer ) It tracks multiple boards.

Let me know if that’s something you need, can probably make it available.

Note that the table shows running cumulative time tracked until and including that day.
